title: 6. NG   points  ( Zu Si Ma ) =  Four horses  =  88.17 / 18 / 19
text:
The combination of these points is one of the most specialized points of lung and skin
diseases and they are very powerful.
Qi Tonify (the booster of Qi energy in the body) =
Strengthening and regulating Qi energy is one of those points functions.
The points are very effective in acute and chronic cough.
They improve the function of the immune system and strengthen the body's defenses
against viruses.
These points are very effective for Influenza and pneumonias and cold.
Used in disorders of the upper respiratory system;
Rhinitis, Sinusitis, Asthma, Allergies, ......
They play an important role in curing a wide range of lung and skin inflammations.
